DELIVER HALTED — UNVERIFIED (clean-checkout-runtime-assets-missing)

Missing runtime assets (declared in config.yaml -> runtime_assets but
absent from the built artifact tree):
  - bin/ffprobe
  - dist/llm/prompts/ru/protocol.md

IntakeItems for the wave-tip commit have NOT been stamped delivered.

Resolution options:
  [1] Restore the missing assets in the build pipeline (ship the
      ffprobe binary; arrange tsc / a build step to copy non-TS
      assets into dist/). Re-run /nacl-tl-deliver.
  [2] File a signed exception under .tl/exceptions/ with
      affected_gates: [clean-checkout-runtime-assets-missing] for
      a single-run carve-out, then re-run.
  [3] Invoke emergency mode (NACL_EMERGENCY=1 + companion env vars);
      the delivery advances with a (emergency-bypass) suffix and is
      NEVER promoted to VERIFIED.

Downstream consequence: nacl-tl-deploy will refuse this commit with
DEPLOY HALTED — BLOCKED (clean-checkout-runtime-assets-missing) until
the evidence artifact reports terminal_status: PASS (or a signed
exception covers the named blocker_detail).
